# Generated by tools/m9_diplomacy.py --write; M9 ancient peace treaties.

antq_treaty_impose_client_king = {
	cost = {
		value = 45
	}
	category = country
	potential = {
		scope:war = { casus_belli ?= casus_belli:antq_impose_client_king }
		scope:loser = {
			can_make_subject_of = {
				target = scope:winner
				type = subject_type:antq_client_kingdom
				ignore_war_limitation = yes
			}
		}
	}
	allow = {
	}
	effect = {
		scope:loser = {
			make_subject_of = {
				target = scope:winner
				type = subject_type:antq_client_kingdom
				war = scope:war
			}
		}
	}
	ai_desire = { value = 1000 }
}

antq_treaty_demand_tribute = {
	cost = {
		value = 35
	}
	category = country
	potential = {
		scope:war = { casus_belli ?= casus_belli:antq_demand_tribute }
		scope:loser = {
			can_make_subject_of = {
				target = scope:winner
				type = subject_type:antq_tributary
				ignore_war_limitation = yes
			}
		}
	}
	allow = {
	}
	effect = {
		scope:loser = {
			make_subject_of = {
				target = scope:winner
				type = subject_type:antq_tributary
				war = scope:war
			}
		}
	}
	ai_desire = { value = 1000 }
}

antq_treaty_impose_satrapy = {
	cost = {
		value = 50
	}
	category = country
	potential = {
		scope:war = { casus_belli ?= casus_belli:antq_succession_intervention }
		scope:loser = {
			can_make_subject_of = {
				target = scope:winner
				type = subject_type:antq_satrapy
				ignore_war_limitation = yes
			}
		}
	}
	allow = {
	}
	effect = {
		scope:loser = {
			make_subject_of = {
				target = scope:winner
				type = subject_type:antq_satrapy
				war = scope:war
			}
		}
	}
	ai_desire = { value = 1000 }
}
